resources.string: Save your server URL and API key securely before you try any link actions.
Browse unread inbox items, archived links, and trash without losing your place.
Paste a URL, add an optional title, and choose whether it should start in your archive.
Enter your Shiori server URL and a valid-looking API key to unlock link actions.
Save your changes before you validate the connection or open links.
API access is saved securely. Validate it before your first sync.
Connection confirmed. Link actions are unlocked.
Shiori rejected this API key. Replace it and try validation again.
Could not reach your Shiori server. Check the URL or network and try again.
No links match this filter yet.
Link saved. Showing it in your inbox.
Link saved. Showing it in your archive.
That link already exists. Showing the saved copy in your inbox.
That link already exists. Showing the saved copy in your archive.
Saving the shared URL to Shiori…
Save valid API access before importing the shared URL.
This share did not include a supported HTTP or HTTPS URL.
Enter an HTTPS URL, or use localhost over HTTP for emulator testing.
Enter a valid-looking API key with no spaces.
Enter a full HTTP or HTTPS URL.
